description: RealEstateAPI provides real-estate data services for developers, including property, owner, tax, mortgage, boundary, valuation, and related datasets. Its product is aimed at integrating property intelligence into software, lending, mapping, and other proptech workflows.
summary: RealEstateAPI exposes a REST HTTP API at `https://api.realestateapi.com` authenticated by an `x-api-key`, plus two SSE MCP servers: a production data server requiring the same API key and a public developer-documentation server with no auth.
